channel.title: Regtech on >_ John Januszczak | Technology & Innovation
channel.description: Recent content in Regtech on >_ John Januszczak | Technology & Innovation

item.title: Unlocking the Basel Framework: How Smart Compliance Drives Higher ROE
item.author: john@januszczak.org (John Januszczak)
item.description: A technical overview of the Basel Framework’s mechanics and how shifting from standardized to internal risk models can optimize capital efficiency and boost Return on Equity (ROE).

item.title: akin
item.author: john@januszczak.org (John Januszczak)
item.description: Self-sovereign identity (SSI) platform that allows users to create a portable, reusable digital identity, streamlining the Know-Your-Customer (KYC) process for banks and reducing onboarding friction across the ecosystem.
